__inputs.name: DS_SUPABASE
__inputs.label: Supabase Postgres
__inputs.description: Select the PostgreSQL data source connected to your Supabase soccer analytics database.

list.name: season
list.label: Season
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT season AS __value, season AS __text FROM matches ORDER BY season DESC;

list.name: team_id
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, name AS __text FROM teams ORDER BY name;

list.name: player_id
list.label: Player
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, full_name AS __text FROM players WHERE team_id = '$team_id' OR '$team_id' = '$__all' ORDER BY full_name;

panels.title: Squad Leaderboard (Season)
panels.description: Sortable season aggregates for every player. Click column headers in Grafana to sort by goals, xG, rating, etc.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pss.full_name AS player, t.name AS team, pss.appearances, pss.total_minutes, pss.goals, pss.assists, round(pss.total_xg,2) AS xg, round(pss.total_xa,2) AS xa, round(pss.goals - pss.total_xg, 2) AS goals_vs_xg, pss.pass_accuracy_pct, pss.avg_rating FROM player_season_stats pss JOIN teams t ON t.id = pss.team_id WHERE pss.season = '$season' AND (t.id = '$team_id' OR '$team_id' = '$__all') ORDER BY pss.goals DESC;

panels.title: Goals vs xG (Over/Underperformance)
panels.description: Points above the diagonal are finishing above their expected goals (clinical); below are underperforming their chances.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pss.full_name AS player, round(pss.total_xg,2) AS xg, pss.goals FROM player_season_stats pss WHERE pss.season = '$season' AND (pss.team_id = '$team_id' OR '$team_id' = '$__all') AND pss.total_xg > 0 ORDER BY pss.goals DESC;

SELECT pss.full_name AS player, round(pss.total_xa,2) AS xa, pss.assists FROM player_season_stats pss WHERE pss.season = '$season' AND (pss.team_id = '$team_id' OR '$team_id' = '$__all') AND pss.total_xa > 0 ORDER BY pss.assists DESC;
SELECT m.kickoff AS time, pms.rating FROM player_match_stats pms JOIN matches m ON m.id = pms.match_id WHERE pms.player_id = '$player_id' AND m.season = '$season' ORDER BY m.kickoff;

panels.title: Selected Player: Minutes per Matchday
panels.description: Spot rotation patterns or fatigue/injury risk from heavy minute loads.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.matchday, pms.minutes_played FROM player_match_stats pms JOIN matches m ON m.id = pms.match_id WHERE pms.player_id = '$player_id' AND m.season = '$season' ORDER BY m.matchday;

SELECT m.matchday, to_char(m.kickoff, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, ht.name AS home, at.name AS away, pms.minutes_played, pms.goals, pms.assists, pms.shots, pms.key_passes, pms.tackles, pms.duels_won, pms.rating FROM player_match_stats pms JOIN matches m ON m.id = pms.match_id JOIN teams ht ON ht.id = m.home_team_id JOIN teams at ON at.id = m.away_team_id WHERE pms.player_id = '$player_id' AND m.season = '$season' ORDER BY m.kickoff DESC;

panels.title: Duel & Defensive Contribution (Squad)
panels.description: Aggregated tackles, interceptions, and duel win rate — useful for identifying defensive workhorses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.full_name AS player, sum(pms.tackles) AS tackles, sum(pms.interceptions) AS interceptions, round(sum(pms.duels_won)::numeric / nullif(sum(pms.duels_won) + sum(pms.duels_lost), 0) * 100, 1) AS duel_win_pct FROM player_match_stats pms JOIN players p ON p.id = pms.player_id JOIN matches m ON m.id = pms.match_id WHERE m.season = '$season' AND (pms.team_id = '$team_id' OR '$team_id' = '$__all') GROUP BY p.full_name ORDER BY tackles DESC LIMIT 15;
